name: 05-31-stage2-rvv-runtime-scalar-memory-selected-body-owner-cleanup
title: Stage2 RVV runtime-scalar memory selected-body owner cleanup
description: Move runtime-scalar memory selected-body realization ownership out of the central RVV selected-body realization file into a dedicated RVV owner module.
creator: codex
notes: Runtime-scalar splat-store, runtime-scalar computed-mask store, and runtime-scalar computed-mask load-store selected-body predicates and production realization moved into RVVRuntimeScalarMemorySelectedBodyRealizationOwner. Central RVVSelectedBodyRealization.cpp keeps only the three registry entries plus shared registry/dispatch mechanics for this family. Focused C++ owner/selected-boundary coverage, runtime-scalar lit/generated-bundle dry-runs, authority scans, git diff --check, and check-tianchenrv passed. No .trellis/spec update was needed because the change implements the existing selected-body owner registry contract without adding a new durable rule.
